description_long: This is a two-story brick house with a steeply pitched gable roof covered in dark, weathered tiles. The front facade features two vertically aligned windows with arched tops and a single entry door, all framed in gray trim. A rectangular skylight is set into the roof, and a brick chimney rises from one side. The rear of the house includes a modern extension with a flat roof and a mix of brick and shingle siding. The side walls are clad in diamond-patterned gray shingles, giving the house a traditional European appearance. The windows are symmetrically arranged on the front, while the rear and sides have fewer and more irregularly placed windows.
description: A two-story brick house with a steep gable roof, gray trim, and a modern rear extension. The facade features arched windows, a single entry door, and a prominent chimney.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry door, two arched windows, and the steep gable roof with a skylight and chimney.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the diamond-patterned shingle siding and the chimney stack, with no visible windows.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the modern extension with a flat roof, a mix of brick and shingle siding, and a single window.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the shingle siding and the extension protruding from the main structure, with no windows visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows on front, asymmetrical on rear and sides
attribute_entryway_design: Single gray-framed door with a small step, no porch or overhang, simple and functional design
